tasks.title: Analyze existing AI cache utility in packages/ai/src/utils/cache.ts
tasks.description: Review the AiCache class implementation in packages/ai/src/utils/cache.ts to understand current caching capabilities, TTL handling, and API. Identify any gaps or improvements needed for production readiness and best practices.
acceptanceCriteria: Clear understanding of current AiCache class functionality and limitations
Documented list of improvements or extensions needed for production use
tasks.expectedResult: A documented analysis of the existing AiCache class with identified improvements for production-ready caching

outputPlan.description: Analysis document of existing AiCache class and improvement plan

metadata.finalOutputContribution: Provides foundation knowledge for implementing a robust AI result cache

tasks.title: Design AI generate result cache interface and integration plan
tasks.description: Design a cache interface and integration approach for AI generate results that supports TTL, concurrency safety, and extensibility. Define how the cache will be used in AI service modules, including key generation strategy and cache invalidation. Document the design with class/interface diagrams and usage examples.
acceptanceCriteria: Cache interface design document created with clear API and integration points
Design includes key generation, TTL, concurrency, and invalidation strategies
tasks.expectedResult: A detailed design document describing the AI generate result cache interface and integration plan

outputPlan.description: Design document for AI generate result cache interface and integration

metadata.inputContext: Analysis of existing cache utility and AI generate result usage context
metadata.finalOutputContribution: Provides a blueprint for implementing a high-quality AI generate result cache

tasks.title: Implement AiGenerateResultCache class in packages/ai/src/utils/generateResultCache.ts
tasks.description: Create a new AiGenerateResultCache class in packages/ai/src/utils/generateResultCache.ts implementing the designed cache interface. Use the existing AiCache as a base or composition. Implement methods for get, set, clear, and TTL management. Include concurrency safety and error handling. Add JSDoc comments and TypeScript types for all methods.
acceptanceCriteria: AiGenerateResultCache class implemented with full caching functionality
Code follows project style and includes comprehensive JSDoc and types
Class supports TTL and concurrency safety
tasks.expectedResult: A new cache class implemented and ready for integration with AI generate result logic

metadata.inputContext: Cache design document and existing AiCache class
metadata.finalOutputContribution: Provides the core caching implementation for AI generate results

tasks.title: Add unit tests for AiGenerateResultCache in packages/ai/src/utils/generateResultCache.test.ts
tasks.description: Create comprehensive unit tests for AiGenerateResultCache covering cache set/get, TTL expiration, concurrency scenarios, and error handling. Use the project test framework and conventions. Ensure tests are deterministic and cover edge cases.
acceptanceCriteria: Unit tests cover all public methods and edge cases
Tests pass reliably in CI environment
tasks.expectedResult: Full test coverage for AiGenerateResultCache with passing tests

metadata.finalOutputContribution: Ensures reliability and correctness of the cache implementation

tasks.title: Integrate AiGenerateResultCache into AI generate result service
tasks.description: Modify the AI generate result service module(s) to use AiGenerateResultCache for caching results. Implement cache key generation based on input parameters. Add cache lookup before AI call and cache set after successful AI response. Handle cache misses and TTL expiration gracefully. Ensure integration follows best practices and does not break existing functionality.
acceptanceCriteria: AI generate result service uses cache correctly
Cache keys are unique and consistent
No regressions in AI generate result functionality
tasks.expectedResult: AI generate result service integrated with caching layer and passing all tests

outputPlan.description: AI generate result service modified to use AiGenerateResultCache

metadata.inputContext: Implemented AiGenerateResultCache and existing AI generate result service code
metadata.finalOutputContribution: Improves performance and reliability of AI generate results via caching

tasks.title: Add integration tests for AI generate result caching behavior
tasks.description: Create integration tests that verify the caching behavior in the AI generate result service. Tests should confirm that repeated calls with the same input return cached results without invoking the AI backend, and that cache expiration triggers fresh AI calls. Use mocks/stubs as needed to isolate cache behavior.
acceptanceCriteria: Integration tests cover cache hit and miss scenarios
Tests reliably detect cache expiration and refresh
No false positives or negatives in cache behavior
tasks.expectedResult: Integration tests validating AI generate result caching behavior with passing results

outputPlan.description: Integration test file for AI generate result caching

metadata.inputContext: AI generate result service with caching integrated
metadata.finalOutputContribution: Ensures caching works correctly in real usage scenarios

tasks.title: Document AI generate result caching usage and best practices
tasks.description: Create or update documentation to explain the AI generate result caching mechanism, usage instructions, configuration options (e.g., TTL), and best practices for developers. Include code examples and troubleshooting tips. Place documentation in docs/ai-generate-cache.md.
acceptanceCriteria: Documentation clearly explains caching design and usage
tasks.expectedResult: Comprehensive documentation for AI generate result caching available in project docs

outputPlan.description: Documentation for AI generate result caching mechanism and usage

metadata.finalOutputContribution: Provides developer guidance for using and maintaining the cache
